title: Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Toledo is a city in Castilla-La Mancha with a population of 85,000. The City of Three Cultures with a stunning medieval old town, El Greco’s masterpieces, and a rich Jewish, Christian, and Muslim heritage.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
